sqlMap.select: select * from ApplSecurityLawyersLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ApplSecurityLawyersLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey AttroneyName NumberOfYrSECExp BillHrsInPast12Months BillHrsInPrior12Months LastUpdateTimeStamp LastUpdateUserID ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #AttroneyName# #NumberOfYrSECExp# #BillHrsInPast12Months# #BillHrsInPrior12Months# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #LastUpdateUserID# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('ApplSecurityLawyersLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select ApplSecurityLawyersKey, AttroneyName, NumberOfYrSECExp, BillHrsInPast12Months, BillHrsInPrior12Months, LastUpdateTimeStamp, LastUpdateUserID, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ApplSecurityLawyersLW where ApplSecurityLawyersKey = #ApplSecurityLawyersKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ApplSecurityLawyersLW set
AttroneyName = #AttroneyName# AttroneyName = null NumberOfYrSECExp = #NumberOfYrSECExp# NumberOfYrSECExp = null BillHrsInPast12Months = #BillHrsInPast12Months# BillHrsInPast12Months = null BillHrsInPrior12Months = #BillHrsInPrior12Months# BillHrsInPrior12Months = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null
where ApplSecurityLawyersKey = #ApplSecurityLawyersKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ApplSecurityLawyersLW where ApplSecurityLawyersKey = #ApplSecurityLawyersKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ApplSecurityLawyersLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select ApplSecurityLawyersKey, AttroneyName, NumberOfYrSECExp, BillHrsInPast12Months, BillHrsInPrior12Months, LastUpdateTimeStamp, LastUpdateUserID, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ApplSecurityLawyersLW where ApplSecurityLawyersKey = #ApplSecurityLawyersKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ApplSecurityLawyersKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AttroneyName, NumberOfYrSECExp, BillHrsInPast12Months, BillHrsInPrior12Months, LastUpdateTimeStamp, LastUpdateUserID from ApplSecurityLawyersLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
